title: Power supply for MRI magnets
assignee: Picker Nordstar Oy (later Philips Medical Systems MR Technologies Finland Oy)
status_note: Displays as Expired - Fee Related (lapsed 2004-12-01) on GP; indicative — verify before reliance
claim_theme: dual-feedback MRI supply tailoring output impedance for 0.1 ppm regulation
indep_claim_gist: MRI power supply with voltage and current feedback loops setting output impedance at least 3 orders above magnet impedance at low frequency (current-source regulation) and at least 1 order below at high frequency (disturbance attenuation).
notes: Expiry-horizon anchor for ppm-class supply loop art: displays as expired 2004 — verify before reliance. Prior-art ceiling for WS-P06-2 combination claims. U-015, U-030.

title: Compact, two stage, zero flux electronically compensated current or voltage transducer employing dual magnetic cores having substantially dissimilar magnetic characteristics
assignee: Schneider Electric USA, Inc.
status_note: Granted as US8421444B2/US8901919B2; displays Active, expiry 2031-07-07; indicative — verify before reliance
claim_theme: two-stage zero-flux transducer, dissimilar dual cores, <±100 ppm class
indep_claim_gist: Actively compensated current ratio transformer with lower-permeability main core and >=3x higher-permeability sense core, primary/measurement/sense windings, amplifier driving sense-winding voltage to substantially zero plus electronic magnetization-error compensation injection.
notes: Live component-level zero-flux art (meter class 0.1); reads on dual-core compensated CT builds, not on converter integration. Cited by LEM US9841441B2 lineage. Design-around: single-core fluxgate or bought-in transducer. U-033.

title: Electrical current transducer
assignee: LEM International SA (as displayed; LEM Intellectual Property lineage)
status_note: Displays as Expired - Fee Related on GP (would run to 2035-12-11); indicative — verify before reliance
claim_theme: U-profile core housing protecting winding during transducer manufacture
indep_claim_gist: Current transducer whose U-shaped insulating core housing has inner/outer wall edges extending beyond core thickness that fold inward under the secondary winding, protecting wire at core corners without a two-part bobbin.
notes: LEM modern estate includes packaging/manufacture-level claims; CN family member CN105652058B granted. Displays expired-fee-related — verify. U-033.

title: Detector circuit to be used for measuring current
assignee: Danfysik A/S (transferred to Liaisons Electroniques-Mecaniques LEM SA)
status_note: Displays as Expired - Fee Related (lapse noted 2020) on GP; indicative — verify before reliance
claim_theme: zero-flux DCCT detector: antiphase auxiliary transformers, pilgrim-wound compensation
indep_claim_gist: Detector circuit for measuring high currents using auxiliary transformers magnetized in antiphase and a compensating winding wound section-at-a-time (pilgrim winding) to cut inter-layer potential differences and parasitic capacitance resonances.
notes: The Danfysik ULTRASTAB-lineage DCCT circuit that seeded LEM IT/ITN class and Danisense founders; CN family member CN1808133B (displays expired 2010). Displays expired — classic zero-flux chain design-usable subject to verification. U-033, U-015.

title: Limit cycle oscillation suppression system and method for particle accelerator power supply
title_zh: 粒子加速器电源限环振荡抑制系统及抑制方法
assignee: Xi'an Actionpower Electric Co., Ltd. 西安爱科赛博电气股份有限公司
status_note: Displays as Pending (A publication) on GP; claims can still change; indicative — verify before reliance
claim_theme: sigma-delta + DSP HRPWM resolution matching to kill digital-loop limit cycles
indep_claim_gist: Accelerator power-supply control system: ADC sampling, dual-loop PI, sigma-delta modulator accumulating quantization residue across control cycles feeding DSP high-resolution PWM, suppressing limit-cycle oscillation from PWM/ADC resolution mismatch without added hardware.
notes: Only active CN merchant filing found squarely on ppm-class digital-loop implementation; pending — watch grant scope. Design-around: hardware DAC resolution or dither-outside-loop. U-015, U-034, U-035.

title: Fluxgate current transducer with an analog measurement channel
assignee: LEM International SA
status_note: Issued 2025-01-21; legal-status line not displayed at FPO — indicative, verify at GP
claim_theme: fluxgate transducer with auxiliary analog measurement channel and reference compensation
indep_claim_gist: Fluxgate transducer: saturable-core excitation coil split into two switch-driven windings; analog measurement channel with ADC, DAC and comparator detecting peak excitation current at core saturation; reference source compensating ADC ratiometricity error.
notes: Live to ~2041 (est. from 2021-07-20 EP 21186819.5 priority; PCT/EP2022/069946). Verified at FPO full text during GP 503 window per A-07; GP search separately displayed number as US12203964B2. Fences mixed-signal fluxgate electronics, not converter integration. U-033, U-030.

title: Closed-loop fluxgate current sensor
assignee: Liaisons Electroniques-Mecaniques LEM SA (as displayed at FPO: LEM Liaisons Electron Mec; inventors Teppan, Azzoni)
status_note: WO application; national/EP fate not displayed at fetched page. 2010-05-10 is the displayed international filing date; 18-month publication rule implies ~2009-05 priority — verify at GP
claim_theme: dual-mode wide-range closed-loop fluxgate measurement
indep_claim_gist: Current sensor with saturable core measuring a wide range via two modes: saturation-time evaluation for small primary currents and average excitation-current evaluation for large currents, operated closed-loop.
notes: Verified at FPO full text per A-07. First-run attribution to Isotel/Platise corrected — this family is LEM's. EP2430469B1 listed from same-title GP search hit; family link indicative, verify page-level. ~2030 horizon (est.). U-033.

title: Feedback control for no-insulation high-temperature superconducting magnet
assignee: The Florida State University Research Foundation, Inc.
status_note: Issued 2023-01-10; legal-status line not displayed at FPO — indicative, verify at GP
claim_theme: power-supply feedback linearizing NI-HTS magnet charging via transfer function
indep_claim_gist: Method: establish reference magnetic field for NI HTS coil, excite with power supply, monitor reference-vs-measured field difference, control supply current through transfer function embedding magnet constant, contact resistance and inductance to cancel charging delay.
notes: Verified at FPO per A-07. Live to ~2036 (est.). Reads on supply-side field-referenced charging control for NI HTS magnets — U-030 lane adjacency; not a ppm DC-stability claim. NHMFL government-support clause. Kind B2 per documented pre-grant publications. U-030, U-015.

title: Method for calibrating a current transducer of the rogowski type
assignee: ABB Technology AG
status_note: Issued 2016-11-29; legal-status line not displayed at FPO — indicative, verify at GP
claim_theme: transducer self-calibration by electronic measurement of coil self-inductance
indep_claim_gist: Calibrating a Rogowski-type current transducer by determining and correcting its sensitivity through measurement of the coil self-inductance by the connected electronic device (step-response or frequency analysis), without external reference current.
notes: Verified at FPO per A-07. Nearest fetched art to WS-P06-1: self-calibration stays transducer-internal and AC/Rogowski — not DCCT-chain, not converter-integrated. ~2032 horizon (est.). U-033, U-018.

title: Fluxgate current transducer
assignee: LEM International SA
status_note: Issued 2025-11-11; legal-status line not displayed at FPO — indicative, verify at GP
claim_theme: FPGA with 1-bit sigma-delta ADCs replacing DSP in fluxgate transducer electronics
indep_claim_gist: Fluxgate current transducer whose controller is an FPGA integrating one-bit sigma-delta ADC front-ends, replacing DSP microcontrollers for excitation control and signal processing to cut cost and size at equal accuracy.
notes: Verified at FPO per A-07. Live to ~2041 (est.; EP 21164001.6 priority, PCT/EP2022/056763). With US12203964B2 shows LEM fencing digital transducer electronics 2021-2025. Kind B2 per PCT-derived pre-grant publication. U-033.

title: Portable magnet power supply for a superconducting magnet and a method for removing energy from a superconducting magnet using a portable magnet power supply
assignee: Siemens Plc
status_note: Issued 2014-04-15; legal-status and kind code not displayed at FPO — indicative, verify at GP
claim_theme: portable rundown supply with phase-change heat storage for SC magnet service
notes: Verified at FPO per A-07; abstract-depth. FPO displayed US class 361/141 only; CPC not captured. Landscape datum: Western major files at service-tooling level (energy removal, PCM heatsink), not regulation level. ~2031 horizon (est.). U-030.

title: Temperature-Compensated Current Sensing and Shunt Arrangements
assignee: Astronics Advanced Electronic Systems Corp.
status_note: A1 publication; grant status not checked at fetched page — indicative
claim_theme: temperature element in amplifier feedback path corrects shunt drift
indep_claim_gist: Current-sense circuit placing a temperature-sensing element in the operational amplifier's negative-feedback path so amplifier gain tracks and cancels the shunt resistance change with temperature.
notes: Verified at FPO per A-07. Nearest fetched art to WS-P06-3 shunt-side thermal correction; aerospace sensing context, not converter-embedded ppm chain. U-033, U-030.

title: State space feedback controller in the digital domain for an MRI gradient coil power supply
assignee: Koninklijke Philips Electronics N.V.
status_note: A1 publication; grant status not checked at fetched page — indicative
claim_theme: all-digital state-space gradient-current controller with loop-delay compensation
indep_claim_gist: Fully digital state-space feedback controller for MRI gradient supply: integrates desired-vs-measured coil-current deviation, generates digital PWM drive values, and feeds back multi-cycle-delayed outputs to compensate system delays for mA-class dynamic accuracy.
notes: Verified at FPO per A-07. Shows live Western precision-loop claims sit MRI-gradient-side (dynamic mA accuracy), not merchant ppm DC stability. U-014.

title: High-precision pulse power supply regulator and method based on frequency domain
title_zh: 基于频域的高精度脉冲电源调节器及方法
assignee: Xi'an Institute of Optics and Precision Mechanics, CAS (current assignee QXP Technologies Inc., 2022 transfer, as displayed)
status_note: Displays Active on GP, anticipated expiration 2034-12-20; indicative — verify before reliance
claim_theme: DDS+FPGA+DAC frequency-domain setpoint synthesis replacing lookup tables
notes: Abstract-depth. Pulse-supply waveform/setpoint synthesis (bit-by-bit voltage regulation, low memory); adjacent to setting-resolution theme but pulse/laser application, not magnet ppm DC loop. CPC not captured at fetch. U-015.

title: High precision digital power supply control regulating apparatus
title_zh: 高精度数字电源控制调节器
assignee: Tianshui Electric Drive Research Institute Group Co Ltd 天水电气传动研究所
status_note: Displays deemed withdrawn after publication (2011) on GP — no live claims; indicative
claim_theme: FPGA soft-core digital regulator replacing analog magnet-PS regulators
notes: Abstract-depth. Historical: CN digital-regulator wave started 2008 (text reports 7.1e-5/8 h output-current stability); withdrawn, design-usable subject to verification. Resolves first-run Tianshui queue item. U-035.

title: System for accelerator excitation curve conversion
title_zh: 一种用于加速器励磁曲线转换的系统
assignee: Institute of High Energy Physics CAS; Spallation Neutron Source Science Center
status_note: WO displays Ceased on GP; CN family members display granted 2023-2026 (live); indicative — verify before reliance
claim_theme: bidirectional field-to-current (I/B) conversion layer for accelerator supply types
indep_claim_gist: System converting physicist-set magnetic-field values into per-supply current values and back in real time, supporting DC, preset-pulse, bump-rail and floating power supplies across an accelerator facility.
notes: CN priority 202110753262.5. Facility-software claim family between control room and converters; five granted CN members to ~2041 (est.). No US/EP entry observed — CN-market exposure only. FPO copy was abstract-only and rejected; GP-verified after recovery. U-032, U-018.

title: Fluxgate heavy current sensor based on digital second harmonic detection and ripple compensation
title_zh: 基于数字二次谐波检测与纹波补偿的磁通门大电流传感器
assignee: ShanghaiTech University (current co-assignee Shanghai United Imaging Healthcare Co Ltd, as displayed)
status_note: Displays Granted/Active on GP; B-publication number not captured at fetch; indicative — verify before reliance
claim_theme: digital second-harmonic fluxgate, LF/HF dual path, algorithmic ripple compensation
indep_claim_gist: Fluxgate high-current sensor: three coils on annular core (low-frequency measuring, feedback, high-frequency measuring); digital second-harmonic detection recovers DC flux, mutual-inductance path covers HF, compensation signal cancels modulation ripple; digital output with zero-drift correction.
notes: CN component electronics going digital; United Imaging co-assignment signals medical-magnet pull. CN-market risk for digital-demodulation DCCT-class builds. Est. horizon ~2039. U-033.

title: Standardized power supply controller of ion accelerator and dynamic local reconfigurable method thereof
title_zh: 离子加速器标准化电源控制器及其动态局部可重配置方法
assignee: Institute of Modern Physics, CAS 中国科学院近代物理研究所
status_note: Displays Active on GP, anticipated expiration 2042-09-20; indicative — verify before reliance
claim_theme: ARM+FPGA standardized accelerator-PS controller, EPICS supports, runtime-reconfigurable modules
indep_claim_gist: Unified accelerator power-supply controller: ARM+FPGA hardware with standardized interfaces; embedded EPICS application exposing 11 standard device supports (reference-waveform control, AI/AO, quench protection); FPGA regulator framework whose ADC, filtering, protection, algorithm and pulse-modulation modules are dynamically locally reconfigurable at runtime.
notes: The IMP platform claim from the first-run queue. CN-market exposure for controller/EPICS-integration products; no US/EP members observed. U-032, U-034, U-035.

title: Debugging and real-time monitoring system and method for accelerator multi-module power supply
title_zh: 一种用于加速器多模块电源的调试与实时监测系统及方法
assignee: Institute of Modern Physics, CAS 中国科学院近代物理研究所
status_note: Displays Pending (A publication) on GP; claims can still change; indicative
claim_theme: SFP-linked multi-module PS digital commissioning with 1 ms real-time monitoring
notes: Abstract-depth. Facility-internal commissioning/monitoring (FPGA main controller, UDP, FIFO/SDRAM buffering, 100 ns debug resolution) — fleet-monitoring adjacency to WS-P06-5, not calibration transfer. U-018, U-032.

title: Ultralow-output-voltage-ripple diode-clamped multi-level direct-current converter and direct-current power supply
title_zh: 极低输出电压纹波二极管钳位多电平直流变换器及直流电源
assignee: Xi'an Actionpower Electric Co Ltd (current assignee Beijing Lanjun Electrical Equipment Co Ltd, 2020 transfer, as displayed)
status_note: Displays Active on GP, anticipated expiration 2034-11-29; indicative — verify before reliance
claim_theme: seven-level diode-clamped DC converter topology for ultra-low output ripple
indep_claim_gist: Diode-clamped multilevel DC converter: three-level input stage, eight self-turn-off devices and three transformers synthesizing seven output levels (±Uin/2kT, ±Uin/3kT, ±Uin/6kT, 0) giving ultra-low output ripple with continuous input current and reduced filtering.
notes: The first-run 'Actionpower 2014 seven-level' item. Topology-level ripple claim aimed at magnet/accelerator supplies; assigned out to Beijing Lanjun 2020 (enforcement posture unclear). CN-market topology risk only. U-014, U-030.

title: Method and device for verifying high-accuracy direct-current comparator
title_zh: 高准确度直流电流比较仪的验证方法和装置
assignee: 514 Institute of China Academy of Space Technology (CAST metrology institute)
status_note: Displays Active on GP, anticipated expiration 2030-12-20 (priority derived from displayed expiration); indicative
claim_theme: series-parallel resistor-array bench verification of 1e-7/1e-8 DCC bridges
indep_claim_gist: Verification method/device for 1e-7 to 1e-8-class DC current comparators: nominally identical resistors combined series/parallel via four-terminal hexahedral nodes with potential- and current-compensation resistors; products of ratio indications across 10/100/1000-ohm arrays bound comparator error without lead-resistance artifacts.
notes: Nearest fetched CN art to WS-P06-5: metrology-bench verification of the comparator itself, not fleet calibration-transfer across converters. U-018.

title: Zero magnetic flux direct-current current transformer electronic measurement unit error detection device
title_zh: 零磁通直流电流互感器电子测量单元误差检测装置
assignee: State Grid Corporation of China and affiliated entities
status_note: Displays Expired on GP (10-year utility-model term ended 2024-07-15); indicative — verify before reliance
claim_theme: automated field error-detection rig for HVDC zero-flux DCCT electronics
notes: CN utility-model dimension per playbook. Grid-side (HVDC) DCCT electronic-unit test rig (0.01-level DC source, IEEE488 multimeters, DSP acquisition), expired-displayed. Shows CN test/verification art clusters grid-side, not accelerator-side. U-018.
